name: Destiny HERO - Doom Lord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ－ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>デステニーヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> デビルガイ
desc: Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish that target. You cannot declare an attack the turn you activate this effect. You must control this face-up Attack Position card to activate and to resolve this effect. The banished monster returns to the opponent's field during your 2nd Standby Phase after activation.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can target 1 monster your opponent controls; banish that target. You cannot declare an attack the turn you activate this effect. You must control this face-up Attack Position card to activate and to resolve this effect. The banished monster returns to the opponent's field during your 2nd Standby Phase after activation.
